roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROB TRANSFER TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY SENT
PEOPLE'S MOT TO CONSOLIDATE (W/11034657); OST FILED
ATTY MOT TO DECLARE CONFLICT FILED
/CAL:APD PC1203,9 TRANSFER TO CONTRA COSTA CO/CTORD:APD PC1203,9 TRANSFERTO CONTRA COSTA CO FROM SAN FRANCISCO IS GRANTED/X:ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED, OVER DA'S OBJECTION,/

/CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 6M/CTS:18/DNACOMP/WS/11590/DTC/LFNEW/RX/VF4:240/PC/PSR/BKFEE/OR25/PF500NEW/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/PAD/COLLECT//DEF:AGREES TO FORFEIT $585 IN MONIES SEIZED/X:6 MONTHS IN THE COUNTY JAILMAY BE SERVED THRU REIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,  IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLETE THE PROGRAM, HE WILL NOT  RECEIVE ANY CREDIT FOR TIME SPENT IN THE PROGRAM/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A DRUG PROGRAM FEE BASE FINE OF $150 PLUS $450 IN PENALTIES AND ASSESSMENTS FOR A TOTAL OF $600 PURSUANT TO HS 11372,7,//OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:BAIL MOTION & DA MOTION TO CONSOL/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/AMEND:TO ADD COUNT 2 - 11351HS AS A FELONY/FAWC/IRRC//DEFT ADV RTS:2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/CO:1170(H)PC PLEA/ARBUCKLE/PRES:02-21-12/CONTD:SENTENCING/TWS/OR/BE/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO DECLARE CONFLICT & DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/CON:JEREMY BLANK/X:COURT CONFIRMS PRELIM HEARING OF 01-19-12/CONTD:BAIL MOTION &DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/DOP/
